brief: US imposes tariffs on over 80 nations amid Middle East tensions, while a NYC stabbing spree and Tesla's stock plunge dominate headlines. Papers explore AI for clinical workflows, visualization tools, and dementia care.
news_summary: Trump administration announces tariffs on over 80 countries for forced labor enforcement; two people stabbed near Central Park; Tesla stock drops 13.5% after weak profits; UN warns Middle East crisis 'getting out of control'.
papers_summary: Research covers HIPAA-compliant AI for clinical assays, a taxonomy for edge bundling tasks, multimodal LLMs for interface construction, and generative AI for social connectedness in dementia care.

en.brief: US imposes tariffs on over 80 nations amid Middle East tensions, while a NYC stabbing spree and Tesla's stock plunge dominate headlines. Papers explore AI for clinical workflows, visualization tools, and dementia care.
en.news_summary: Trump administration announces tariffs on over 80 countries for forced labor enforcement; two people stabbed near Central Park; Tesla stock drops 13.5% after weak profits; UN warns Middle East crisis 'getting out of control'.
en.papers_summary: Research covers HIPAA-compliant AI for clinical assays, a taxonomy for edge bundling tasks, multimodal LLMs for interface construction, and generative AI for social connectedness in dementia care.

zh.brief: 今日焦點包括香港民主派人士胡志偉在英國機場險遭遣返、台灣收緊陸配參選資格，以及美國與沙特簽署核協議引發擴散擔憂。論文方面，多項研究聚焦AI在臨床工作流程、可視化任務分類及痴呆症護理中的應用。
zh.news_summary: 香港47人案被告胡志偉在倫敦希斯羅機場被扣留後獲准入境；台灣修改陸配參選資格要求除籍滿十年；中國電影《澎湖海戰》因觸及歷史敏感擱置上映。
zh.papers_summary: 多篇論文探討AI輔助臨床檢驗工作流程、邊緣捆綁可視化任務分類，以及生成式AI在痴呆症護理中促進社交聯繫的倫理與社會技術視角。

todays_image.caption: The 1831 map’s orderly borders chart a world of planned spaces, while today’s attack shatters that illusion of safety in one of its most iconic landmarks.
todays_image.title: 1831 World Map by Marianne S. Fernald, Student at Charlestown Female Academy
